c.d: Total number of monthly active users globally, indicating network effect and likelihood friends are using the platform
c.s: Company reports, market research firms, app analytics platforms

c.d: Availability and quality of instant messaging, voice calls, video calls, and group communication features
c.s: App store descriptions, feature documentation, user reviews

c.d: Support across iOS, Android, web, and desktop platforms ensuring accessibility regardless of device
c.s: Official app stores, developer websites, compatibility documentation

c.d: Features that help users find and connect with friends, such as contact syncing, friend suggestions, and username search
c.s: App functionality analysis, feature lists, user interface reviews

c.d: End-to-end encryption, privacy settings, data protection measures, and user control over personal information
c.s: Privacy policies, security audits, encryption documentation, user settings
